wiki.summary: “GEMINI SEASON” is a surprise release by American rapper Ye on his 49th birthday, June 8, 2026. Dedicated to his wife, Bianca Censori, the track centers on sexual situations and Censori’s looks. The song was accidentally released at 12:55 PM PDT while Ye was still performing in the Netherlands; however, it was taken down shortly after. The song, alongside its music video, was then reuploaded at 2:27 PM PDT. The track is promotional material for the release of the upcoming deluxe edition of his twelfth studio album BULLY Read more on Last.fm.
wiki.content: “GEMINI SEASON” is a surprise release by American rapper Ye on his 49th birthday, June 8, 2026. Dedicated to his wife, Bianca Censori, the track centers on sexual situations and Censori’s looks. The song was accidentally released at 12:55 PM PDT while Ye was still performing in the Netherlands; however, it was taken down shortly after. The song, alongside its music video, was then reuploaded at 2:27 PM PDT. The track is promotional material for the release of the upcoming deluxe edition of his twelfth studio album BULLY, releasing on June 19th. The music video, directed by Censori, features her in a highly provocative outfit, milking a cow. Later, Ye walks up to her and gives her a drink of milk. Read more on Last.fm.
